---
title: "Sentences"
---

:::{.callout-warning}
Under development
:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 10/15 | Sentences | SGN Ch. 7, *Structure and prediction* (p. 116-138) | | 
| Tues 10/20 | Constituent structure<br>Methods spotlight: fMRI | Pallier et al. (2011) | 
| Thurs 10/22 | Is Broca's area dedicated to syntax? | Matchin et al. (2014) | 
| Tues 10/27 | Sentence structure in aphasia | Dronkers & Baldo (2009) | [UBC aphasia videos](https://neuroanatomy.ca/modules/Language/story.html) |
| Thurs 10/29 | Sign language aphasia |  Hickok, Bellugi, & Klima (1998) | |
| Tues 11/3 | <span class="exam-badge">Exam #3</span>


::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Sentences
(To be added)

:::
